Organizational.description: Policies, roles, supplier management, incident management, business continuity, and compliance

People.description: Screening, employment terms, training, disciplinary, termination, remote working, and event reporting

Physical.description: Physical perimeters, entry controls, equipment protection, and secure disposal

Technological.description: Endpoint devices, access control, cryptography, vulnerability management, secure development, and network security

controls.description: Information security policy and topic-specific policies shall be defined, approved by management, published, communicated to and acknowledged by relevant personnel and relevant interested parties, and reviewed at planned intervals or if significant changes occur.
controls.required_evidence: Approved information security policy; topic-specific policies (access control, cryptography, etc.); evidence of management sign-off; distribution records; annual review records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: current IS policy document with approval date and management signature. Verify: policy covers all required areas. Confirm: distribution to staff and acknowledgement records. Check: last review date is within 12 months.

controls.description: Information security roles and responsibilities shall be defined and allocated according to the organisation needs.
controls.required_evidence: RACI or roles and responsibilities matrix; job descriptions with security responsibilities; ISMS ownership documentation.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: roles and responsibilities document. Verify: key security roles are assigned (CISO, data owner, system owner). Confirm: responsibilities are documented in job descriptions.

controls.description: Conflicting duties and conflicting areas of responsibility shall be segregated.
controls.required_evidence: Segregation of duties matrix; access control records showing separation of admin/approver roles; evidence of compensating controls where full SoD is not feasible.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: SoD matrix. Select sample of high-risk roles and verify no single person holds conflicting duties. Confirm compensating controls where SoD cannot be achieved.

controls.description: Management shall require all personnel to apply information security in accordance with the established information security policy, topic-specific policies and procedures of the organisation.
controls.required_evidence: Management communication records; training completion records; policy acknowledgement sign-offs; performance objectives including security responsibilities.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Confirm management communications mandate security compliance. Verify security responsibilities appear in performance objectives for relevant roles.

controls.description: The organisation shall establish and maintain contact with relevant authorities.
controls.required_evidence: Register of relevant authorities (regulators, law enforcement, CERT); documented escalation procedures; records of contacts maintained.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: authority contact register. Verify procedures exist for contacting authorities. Confirm at least one responsible person is named.

controls.description: The organisation shall establish and maintain contact with special interest groups or other specialist security forums and professional associations.
controls.required_evidence: Memberships in ISACs, CERT mailing lists, or security forums; evidence of participation; threat intelligence subscriptions.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Confirm membership or subscription to at least one relevant security forum or intelligence feed. Verify security team receives and acts on intelligence.

controls.description: Information relating to information security threats shall be collected and analysed to produce threat intelligence.
controls.required_evidence: Threat intelligence feeds subscribed to; process for ingesting and acting on threat intel; evidence of threat intel informing risk assessments or security controls.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: threat intelligence sources and process. Verify threat intel is being reviewed and actioned. Confirm it feeds into the risk assessment process.

controls.description: Information security shall be integrated into project management.
controls.required_evidence: Project management methodology with security gates; security requirements documented in project briefs; DPIA or security impact assessment records for new projects.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Select sample of projects. Verify security requirements were identified at initiation. Confirm security sign-off exists before go-live.

controls.control_name: Inventory of information and other associated assets
controls.description: An inventory of information and other associated assets, including owners, shall be developed and maintained.
controls.required_evidence: Asset register covering information assets, hardware, software, and cloud services; asset ownership assigned; last review/update date.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: asset register. Verify completeness — covers data, systems, applications, cloud services. Confirm each asset has an assigned owner. Check register is current.

controls.control_name: Acceptable use of information and other associated assets
controls.description: Rules for the acceptable use and procedures for handling information and other associated assets shall be identified, documented and implemented.
controls.required_evidence: Acceptable Use Policy (AUP); staff acknowledgement records; procedures for handling information assets by classification.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: AUP document with current version and review date. Confirm staff have signed/acknowledged AUP. Verify procedures cover all classification levels.

controls.description: Personnel and other interested parties as appropriate shall return all the organisation's assets in their possession upon change or termination of their employment, contract or agreement.
controls.required_evidence: Offboarding checklist with asset return confirmation; records of returned devices and credentials; IT asset return receipts.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Sample recent leavers. Verify offboarding checklist was completed. Confirm assets were returned or remote wiped. Check access was revoked.

controls.description: Information shall be classified according to the information security needs of the organisation based on confidentiality, integrity, availability and relevant interested party requirements.
controls.typical_frequency: Annual review of scheme / continuous application
controls.required_evidence: Information classification policy and scheme; classification labels applied to assets in the asset register; training records on classification.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: classification policy and scheme. Verify classification levels are defined. Sample data assets and confirm classification has been applied. Check training records.

controls.description: An appropriate set of procedures for information labelling shall be developed and implemented in accordance with the information classification scheme.
controls.required_evidence: Labelling procedure; examples of labelled documents or systems; DLP or classification tool configuration evidence.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: labelling procedures. Sample documents and data assets to verify labels are applied consistently. Review DLP or classification tool configurations.

controls.description: Information transfer rules, procedures, or agreements shall be in place for all types of transfer facilities within the organisation and between the organisation and other parties.
controls.required_evidence: Data transfer policy; encryption requirements for data in transit; NDA and DPA agreements with third parties; secure email or file transfer tool configuration evidence.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: data transfer policy. Verify encryption is required for all external transfers. Sample recent transfers and confirm compliance. Check NDAs are in place with key parties.

controls.description: Rules to control physical and logical access to information and other associated assets shall be established and implemented based on business and information security requirements.
controls.required_evidence: Access control policy; role-based access control (RBAC) configuration; access provisioning and deprovisioning procedures; user access review records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: access control policy. Verify RBAC or least privilege is implemented. Confirm access provisioning workflow exists. Review user access review records (last quarter).

controls.description: The full lifecycle of identities shall be managed.
controls.required_evidence: Identity lifecycle procedures (provisioning, modification, deprovisioning); unique user ID policy; directory service or IAM platform configuration; joiner/mover/leaver process records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: identity management procedures. Verify unique user IDs are enforced. Sample user lifecycle events — new starters, role changes, leavers — and confirm process was followed.

controls.description: Allocation and management of authentication information shall be controlled by a management process, including advising personnel on appropriate handling of authentication information.
controls.required_evidence: Password policy (length, complexity, rotation); MFA enforcement evidence; privileged account authentication controls; training on secure password handling.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: password policy configuration in identity provider. Verify MFA is enforced for all users, especially privileged. Confirm default/shared credentials are not in use.

controls.description: Access rights to information and other associated assets shall be provisioned, reviewed, modified and removed in accordance with the organisation's topic-specific policy on and rules for access control.
controls.required_evidence: Access provisioning and deprovisioning records; quarterly user access review reports; evidence of access removal on termination or role change.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Sample users who left in last 6 months — verify access was removed promptly. Inspect last access review — confirm manager sign-off. Verify privileged access is reviewed at least quarterly.

controls.description: Processes and procedures shall be defined and implemented to manage the information security risks associated with the use of supplier's products or services.
controls.required_evidence: Supplier security policy; supplier risk assessment procedure; register of suppliers with classification; security questionnaire or assessment records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: supplier policy. Verify risk-based approach to supplier management. Sample key suppliers and confirm security assessments are on file. Confirm classification of suppliers by risk tier.

controls.control_name: Addressing information security within supplier agreements
controls.description: Relevant information security requirements shall be established and agreed with each supplier based on the type of supplier relationship.
controls.required_evidence: Data Processing Agreements (DPAs); contracts with information security clauses; sub-processor agreements; NDA records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Sample key supplier contracts. Verify security obligations, DPA, audit rights, breach notification requirements, and data handling obligations are included.

controls.control_name: Managing information security in the ICT supply chain
controls.description: Processes and procedures shall be defined and implemented to manage the information security risks associated with the ICT products and services supply chain.
controls.required_evidence: ICT supply chain risk assessment; software/hardware provenance verification; SBOM or approved vendor list; third-party component risk reviews.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Verify ICT supply chain risks are assessed. Check approved vendor/product lists. Confirm processes exist for validating integrity of ICT components.

controls.control_name: Monitoring, review and change management of supplier services
controls.description: The organisation shall regularly monitor, review, and manage changes to supplier information security practices and service delivery.
controls.required_evidence: Supplier review records (annual); service level reports; records of supplier security incidents or changes; re-assessment records when material changes occur.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Select key suppliers. Verify annual reviews are conducted. Confirm supplier changes trigger reassessment. Check SLA and security performance monitoring evidence.

controls.control_name: Information security for use of cloud services
controls.description: Processes for acquisition, use, management and exit from cloud services shall be established in accordance with the organisation's information security requirements.
controls.required_evidence: Cloud security policy; approved cloud service register; shared responsibility model documentation per cloud provider; cloud exit plan; cloud configuration standards.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect cloud security policy. Verify shared responsibility models are documented for each cloud provider. Confirm cloud services are inventoried and assessed. Check exit provisions in contracts.

controls.control_name: Information security incident management planning and preparation
controls.description: The organisation shall plan and prepare for managing information security incidents by defining, establishing and communicating information security incident management processes, roles and responsibilities.
controls.required_evidence: Incident response plan; defined incident response roles and RACI; communication and escalation procedures; incident classification criteria.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: IR plan with current review date. Verify roles are assigned. Confirm classification criteria cover data breach, ransomware, insider threat scenarios. Check communication procedures.

controls.control_name: Assessment and decision on information security events
controls.description: The organisation shall assess information security events and decide if they are to be categorised as information security incidents.
controls.required_evidence: Incident triage procedures; incident log showing assessment decisions; classification criteria applied to events; escalation records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: incident triage procedure. Review recent incident log. Confirm classification decisions are documented with rationale. Verify escalation thresholds are defined.

controls.description: Information security incidents shall be responded to in accordance with the documented procedures.
controls.required_evidence: Incident response records; evidence of containment, eradication, recovery actions taken; post-incident review reports; regulatory notifications (if applicable).
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Sample recent incidents. Verify response followed the documented IR plan. Confirm containment and recovery actions are logged. Check regulatory notification obligations were met.

controls.description: Knowledge gained from information security incidents shall be used to strengthen and improve the information security controls.
controls.required_evidence: Post-incident review reports; lessons learned register; evidence of control improvements implemented following incidents; ISMS updates triggered by incidents.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: lessons learned register. Sample incidents — verify post-incident reviews were conducted. Confirm at least one control improvement was implemented. Check ISMS update cycle.

controls.description: The organisation shall establish and implement procedures for the identification, collection, acquisition and preservation of evidence related to information security events.
controls.required_evidence: Forensic evidence handling procedure; evidence chain-of-custody records; log retention policy (sufficient for forensics); evidence of preserved logs for recent incidents.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: evidence handling procedure. Confirm chain-of-custody process. Verify log retention meets forensic requirements. Sample a recent incident and confirm evidence was preserved.

controls.description: The organisation shall plan how to maintain information security at an appropriate level during disruption.
controls.required_evidence: Business continuity plan with information security provisions; security controls applicable during disruption; tested BCP with evidence of test outcomes.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: BCP covering security during disruption. Verify security controls are maintained during failover/recovery. Confirm BCP was tested in the last 12 months with documented outcomes.

controls.description: ICT readiness shall be planned, implemented, maintained and tested based on business continuity objectives and ICT continuity requirements.
controls.required_evidence: ICT continuity plan; RTO/RPO targets per system; DR test records; failover test results; backup verification records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: ICT continuity plan with RTO/RPO targets. Verify annual DR test evidence. Confirm backup restoration was tested. Check failover configurations for critical systems.

controls.control_name: Legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements
controls.description: Legal, statutory, regulatory and contractual requirements relevant to information security and the organisation's approach to meet these requirements shall be identified, documented and kept up to date.
controls.required_evidence: Legal and regulatory requirements register; mapping of controls to regulations; evidence of compliance activities (GDPR, sector regulations); compliance calendar.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: legal/regulatory register. Verify it is current. Confirm controls are mapped to applicable requirements. Check evidence of compliance activities (DPIAs, audits).

controls.description: The organisation shall implement appropriate procedures to protect intellectual property rights.
controls.required_evidence: IP rights policy; software licence register; records of authorised software use; procedures for reporting IP breaches.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: IP policy. Verify software licence register is maintained. Confirm processes exist to prevent use of unlicensed software. Check licence compliance records.

controls.description: Records shall be protected from loss, destruction, falsification, unauthorised access and unauthorised release.
controls.required_evidence: Records retention and disposal policy; records classification and protection controls; access controls on records systems; audit logs for record access.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: records retention policy. Verify retention periods align with legal requirements. Confirm access controls protect critical records. Check immutability or write-protection on audit logs.

controls.control_name: Privacy and protection of personally identifiable information
controls.description: The organisation shall identify and meet the requirements regarding the preservation of privacy and protection of PII according to applicable laws and regulations and contractual requirements.
controls.required_evidence: Privacy policy; DPIA records; records of processing activities (ROPA); data subject rights process; consent management records; breach notification procedure.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: privacy policy and ROPA. Verify DPIAs are conducted for high-risk processing. Confirm data subject rights process is in place. Check breach notification procedure.

controls.description: The organisation's approach to managing information security and its implementation including people, processes and technologies shall be reviewed independently at planned intervals or when significant changes occur.
controls.required_evidence: Internal audit programme and reports; internal audit findings and management responses; evidence of audit closure; third-party or independent review records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: internal audit programme. Verify at least one audit of the ISMS has been completed in the last 12 months. Confirm findings were reviewed and actioned by management.

controls.control_name: Compliance with policies, rules and standards for information security
controls.description: Compliance with the organisation's information security policy, topic-specific policies, rules and standards shall be regularly reviewed.
controls.required_evidence: Compliance review records; technical compliance scanning results; management review outputs; non-compliance tracking and remediation records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Confirm regular compliance reviews are scheduled and conducted. Inspect compliance scan results. Verify non-compliance findings are tracked and remediated.

controls.description: Operating procedures for information processing facilities shall be documented and made available to personnel who need them.
controls.required_evidence: Operating procedure documents for key IT processes; version control records; evidence procedures are accessible to relevant staff; review/approval records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: sample of operating procedures. Verify current version with review date. Confirm procedures are stored in accessible location. Check key operational tasks are covered.

controls.description: Background verification checks on all candidates to become personnel shall be carried out prior to joining the organisation and on an ongoing basis taking into consideration applicable laws, regulations and ethics.
controls.required_evidence: Background check policy; pre-employment screening records (DBS, reference, right-to-work); evidence checks are conducted for relevant contractors; screening consent records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Sample new hires from last 12 months. Verify pre-employment screening was completed before start date. Confirm screening scope is proportionate to role sensitivity.

controls.description: The employment contractual agreements shall state the personnel's and the organisation's responsibilities for information security.
controls.required_evidence: Employment contracts with information security clauses; NDAs; acceptable use policy acknowledgements; signed copies on file.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Sample employment contracts. Verify IS obligations, confidentiality, and acceptable use requirements are included. Confirm signed NDAs are on file for staff with access to sensitive data.

controls.control_name: Information security awareness, education and training
controls.description: Personnel of the organisation and relevant interested parties shall receive appropriate information security awareness, education and training and regular updates of the organisation's information security policy, topic-specific policies and procedures.
controls.required_evidence: Security awareness training programme; completion records for all staff; phishing simulation results; training content updated for current threats; new hire training records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Confirm annual security awareness training programme exists. Inspect completion records — target >90% completion. Check training content is updated. Review phishing simulation results.

controls.description: A disciplinary process shall be formalised and communicated to take action against personnel and other relevant interested parties who have committed an information security policy violation.
controls.required_evidence: Disciplinary policy referencing IS violations; procedure communicated to staff; records of disciplinary actions taken (anonymised); escalation criteria.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: disciplinary policy covering IS violations. Verify staff have been informed. Confirm process escalates based on severity. Check records of actions taken.

controls.control_name: Responsibilities after termination or change of employment
controls.description: Information security responsibilities and duties that remain valid after termination or change of employment shall be defined, enforced and communicated to relevant personnel and other interested parties.
controls.required_evidence: Post-employment obligations in employment contracts; offboarding process records; confirmation of ongoing confidentiality obligations communicated at exit.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: employment contracts for post-termination IS obligations. Sample recent leavers — verify obligations were communicated at exit. Confirm access was revoked on or before last day.

controls.description: Requirements for confidentiality or non-disclosure agreements reflecting the organisation's needs for the protection of information shall be identified, documented, regularly reviewed and signed by personnel and other relevant interested parties.
controls.typical_frequency: On hire / On engagement / Annual review
controls.required_evidence: NDA template; signed NDA register for staff and contractors; review records confirming NDAs remain current.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: NDA template with current legal review date. Sample staff and contractors — confirm signed NDAs are on file. Verify NDAs cover all relevant categories of confidential information.

controls.description: Security measures shall be implemented when personnel are working remotely to protect information accessed, processed or stored outside the organisation's premises.
controls.required_evidence: Remote working policy; VPN or ZTNA configuration evidence; endpoint security configuration (MDM, encryption); secure remote access logs; screen lock and clean screen compliance.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: remote working policy. Verify VPN/secure access is mandated. Confirm endpoint devices have encryption and MDM. Sample remote access logs for compliance.

controls.description: The organisation shall provide a mechanism for personnel to report observed or suspected information security events through appropriate channels in a timely manner.
controls.required_evidence: Incident reporting channel (email, ticketing, hotline); staff awareness of reporting mechanism; records of events reported by staff; reporting statistics.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Verify an accessible reporting mechanism exists. Confirm staff are aware of it (via training records). Review recent events reported through the channel.

controls.description: Security perimeters shall be defined and used to protect areas that contain information and other associated assets.
controls.required_evidence: Site security policy; physical perimeter controls (fences, locked doors, access barriers); signage; building access control records; security zone map.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: physical security perimeter controls. Verify clearly defined secure zones. Confirm access controls are in place at perimeter. Walk-through or photographic evidence.

controls.description: Secure areas shall be protected by appropriate entry controls to ensure that only authorised personnel are allowed access.
controls.required_evidence: Physical access control system (keycards, PIN, biometrics); visitor log; entry/exit records for secure areas; review of physical access rights.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: physical access control records for server room and secure areas. Verify access is restricted to authorised individuals. Review visitor log. Confirm access rights are reviewed.

controls.description: Physical security for offices, rooms and facilities shall be designed and implemented.
controls.required_evidence: Physical security assessment records; lock and key register; secure room configurations; evidence of physical security review.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Verify offices housing sensitive systems are secured. Confirm server/equipment rooms have additional access controls. Inspect physical security assessment records.

controls.description: Premises shall be continuously monitored for unauthorised physical access.
controls.required_evidence: CCTV system records and retention policy; alarm system logs; physical intrusion detection evidence; records of physical security monitoring reviews.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Confirm CCTV covers entry points and secure areas. Verify footage is retained per policy. Inspect alarm system test records. Confirm monitoring is continuous.

controls.control_name: Protecting against physical and environmental threats
controls.description: Protection against physical and environmental threats, such as natural disasters, malicious attack or accidents shall be designed and implemented.
controls.required_evidence: Physical risk assessment including environmental threats; fire suppression system records; flood/water detection evidence; UPS maintenance records; environmental threat mitigation measures.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: physical risk assessment for environmental threats. Verify fire suppression, water detection, and power protection are in place and tested. Confirm records are current.

controls.description: Security measures for working in secure areas shall be designed and applied.
controls.required_evidence: Secure area working procedures; clean desk and screen policy; visitor escort procedures; rules on use of personal devices in secure areas.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: secure area working procedures. Confirm staff are briefed on requirements. Verify visitors are escorted. Check personal device restrictions are enforced.

controls.description: Clear desk rules for papers and removable storage media and clear screen rules for information processing facilities shall be defined and appropriately enforced.
controls.required_evidence: Clear desk and clear screen policy; compliance audit records (periodic physical walkthroughs); screen lock configuration evidence.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: clear desk/screen policy. Verify screen lock timeout is configured. Confirm periodic physical walkthroughs are conducted and documented.

controls.description: Equipment shall be sited and protected to reduce the risks from physical and environmental threats and from unauthorised access.
controls.required_evidence: Equipment placement records (racks, cabling); physical security of server rooms; environmental monitoring for temperature/humidity; equipment placement guidelines.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect server room / data centre environment. Confirm equipment is positioned to minimise physical and environmental risk. Verify temperature/humidity monitoring is in place.

controls.description: Off-site assets shall be protected.
controls.required_evidence: Off-site asset policy; records of assets taken off-site; encryption of laptops and mobile devices; MDM enrolment records; remote wipe capability.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: off-site asset policy. Verify laptops are encrypted. Confirm MDM is deployed for mobile devices. Sample off-site asset log and verify controls applied.

controls.description: Storage media shall be managed through their lifecycle of acquisition, use, transportation and disposal in accordance with the organisation's classification scheme and handling requirements.
controls.required_evidence: Media handling policy; inventory of removable media; secure media disposal records (certificates of destruction); encryption of portable media.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: media policy. Verify removable media is encrypted. Confirm disposal uses certified destruction. Sample disposal records for recent media.

controls.description: Information processing facilities shall be protected from power failures and other disruptions caused by failures in supporting utilities.
controls.required_evidence: UPS and generator maintenance records; power failure test records; redundant utility connections; utility failure response procedures.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Verify UPS is installed and tested. Confirm generator (if applicable) is maintained and tested. Inspect utility failure response procedures. Check redundancy provisions.

controls.description: Cables carrying power or data or supporting information services shall be protected from interception, interference or damage.
controls.required_evidence: Cabling standards and schematics; physical inspection records; evidence of segregation of power and data cabling; locked cable conduits.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect cabling installation. Verify power and data cables are segregated. Confirm cables in public areas are protected. Check cabling diagrams are documented.

controls.description: Equipment shall be maintained correctly to ensure availability, integrity and confidentiality of information.
controls.required_evidence: Equipment maintenance schedule; maintenance records; evidence of authorised maintenance personnel; records that maintenance does not expose information.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: maintenance records for critical equipment. Verify maintenance is performed by authorised personnel. Confirm sensitive data is removed or protected before maintenance.

controls.control_name: Secure disposal or re-use of equipment
controls.description: Items of equipment containing storage media shall be verified to ensure that any sensitive data and licensed software has been removed or securely overwritten prior to disposal or re-use.
controls.required_evidence: Secure disposal policy; data sanitisation records (NIST 800-88 or equivalent); certificates of destruction from ITAD vendor; disposal register.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: disposal policy and procedure. Sample disposal records. Verify data sanitisation method meets policy standard. Confirm certificates of destruction are retained.

controls.description: Information stored on, processed by or accessible via user endpoint devices shall be protected.
controls.required_evidence: Endpoint security policy; MDM enrolment records; encryption status (BitLocker/FileVault); AV/EDR deployment evidence; patch compliance reports.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Verify all endpoints are enrolled in MDM. Confirm full-disk encryption is enforced. Inspect AV/EDR deployment reports. Review patch compliance — confirm >95% current.

controls.description: The allocation and use of privileged access rights shall be restricted and managed.
controls.required_evidence: Privileged access policy; list of privileged accounts; PAM tool configuration or admin account register; quarterly privileged access review records; just-in-time access evidence.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: privileged account register. Verify privileged accounts are minimised (principle of least privilege). Confirm quarterly review records. Check separate admin accounts are used for privileged tasks.

controls.description: Access to information and other associated assets shall be restricted in accordance with the established access control policy.
controls.required_evidence: Access control matrix; role-based access control configuration; data classification-aligned access controls; access review reports showing least privilege.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Sample systems and verify access controls enforce least privilege. Review access matrix. Confirm access aligns with data classification. Check access review records.

controls.description: Read and write access to source code, development tools and software libraries shall be appropriately managed.
controls.required_evidence: Source code repository access controls; RBAC on code repositories; records of access reviews; branch protection rules; separation of prod deploy access from code write access.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: source code repository permissions. Verify access is restricted to developers by role. Confirm production deployment rights are separate. Review access review records.

controls.description: Secure authentication technologies and procedures shall be implemented based on information access restrictions and the topic-specific policy on access control.
controls.required_evidence: MFA enforcement evidence (all users, all systems); SSO configuration; passwordless authentication evidence where applicable; authentication failure logging.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Confirm MFA is enforced for all users. Verify SSO is implemented for key applications. Inspect authentication logs for failed login monitoring. Check password standards meet policy.

controls.description: The use of resources shall be monitored and adjusted in line with current and expected capacity requirements.
controls.required_evidence: Capacity monitoring dashboards; alerts for resource thresholds; capacity planning records; evidence of auto-scaling or resource adjustment.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: capacity monitoring configuration. Verify alerts are configured for CPU, memory, storage thresholds. Confirm capacity planning reviews are conducted. Check auto-scaling where applicable.

controls.description: Protection against malware shall be implemented and supported by appropriate user awareness.
controls.required_evidence: AV/EDR deployment status report; malware protection policy; definition update schedule; email filtering and web proxy malware scanning evidence; user awareness training records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Verify AV/EDR is deployed on all endpoints and servers. Confirm definitions are updated automatically. Inspect email gateway malware filtering. Review recent malware detection logs.

controls.description: Information about technical vulnerabilities of information systems in use shall be obtained in a timely fashion, the organisation's exposure to such vulnerabilities evaluated and appropriate measures taken.
controls.required_evidence: Vulnerability scanning results (last 30 days); patch management policy; patching schedule; critical vulnerability remediation records; penetration test reports.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: vulnerability scan results. Confirm critical CVEs are remediated within SLA. Review patch management records. Verify penetration test was conducted in the last 12 months.

controls.description: Configurations, including security configurations, of hardware, software, services and networks shall be established, documented, implemented, monitored and reviewed.
controls.required_evidence: Security baseline configurations (CIS benchmarks or equivalent); configuration management database (CMDB) or IaC records; compliance scanning against baselines; configuration drift detection evidence.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: security baseline configurations. Verify baselines are applied. Run compliance scan against baseline. Confirm configuration drift is detected and remediated. Check CMDB is current.

controls.description: Information stored in information systems, devices or in any other storage media shall be deleted when no longer required.
controls.required_evidence: Data retention and deletion policy; automated deletion schedule records; deletion confirmation logs; secure deletion certificates for sensitive data.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: data retention policy with defined periods. Verify automated deletion is configured. Sample deletion logs. Confirm data subject erasure requests are fulfilled within SLA.

controls.description: Data masking shall be used in accordance with the organisation's topic-specific policy on access control and other related topic-specific policies, and business requirements, considering applicable legislation.
controls.required_evidence: Data masking policy; masking implemented in non-production environments; tokenisation or pseudonymisation evidence for PII; developer access restrictions on real data.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Verify production data is not used in development/test environments without masking. Inspect masking tool configuration. Confirm PII is pseudonymised or tokenised where required.

controls.description: Data leakage prevention measures shall be applied to systems, networks and any other devices that process, store or transmit sensitive information.
controls.required_evidence: DLP policy; DLP tool deployment evidence; DLP alert/incident records; email DLP configuration; endpoint DLP or USB restriction evidence.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Confirm DLP controls are deployed. Verify coverage includes email, web upload, and endpoint. Inspect DLP policy definitions for sensitive data types. Review recent DLP alerts and incident handling.

controls.description: Backup copies of information, software and systems shall be maintained and regularly tested in accordance with the agreed topic-specific policy on backup.
controls.required_evidence: Backup policy (frequency, retention, offsite); backup completion logs; backup restoration test records (at least annual); offsite or cloud backup evidence; RTO/RPO alignment.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: backup policy. Verify backups are running per schedule. Confirm last restore test date and result. Check offsite backups exist. Verify backup covers all critical systems.

controls.description: Information processing facilities shall be implemented with redundancy sufficient to meet availability requirements.
controls.required_evidence: Redundancy architecture documentation; uptime monitoring records; failover test results; multi-AZ or multi-region deployment evidence; SLA compliance reports.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: redundancy architecture. Verify critical systems have failover capability. Confirm failover has been tested. Review uptime monitoring — confirm SLA targets are being met.

controls.description: Logs that record activities, exceptions, faults and other relevant events shall be produced, stored, protected and analysed.
controls.required_evidence: Logging policy (what to log, retention period); SIEM or centralised log management evidence; log coverage report (key systems, applications, cloud); log integrity protection.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: logging policy. Verify SIEM or centralised logging is in place. Confirm logs cover authentication, privilege use, data access, and network activity. Check log retention meets policy.

controls.description: Networks, systems and applications shall be monitored for anomalous behaviour and appropriate actions taken to evaluate potential information security incidents.
controls.required_evidence: Security monitoring policy; SIEM alerts and rules; IDS/IPS deployment evidence; anomaly detection records; SOC or monitoring team procedures; alert response SLAs.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Confirm continuous monitoring is in place. Inspect SIEM rule coverage. Verify alerts are tuned and reviewed. Check IDS/IPS deployment. Review recent alert/incident response records.

controls.description: The clocks of information processing systems used by the organisation shall be synchronised to approved time sources.
controls.required_evidence: NTP configuration across all systems; evidence all servers and devices sync to approved time source; monitoring for clock drift.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Verify NTP is configured on all systems. Confirm time source is authoritative. Check clock synchronisation monitoring is in place. Confirm logs have accurate timestamps.

controls.description: The use of utility programs that might be capable of overriding system and application controls shall be restricted and tightly controlled.
controls.required_evidence: Authorised utility programs list; access controls restricting utility usage; audit logs of privileged utility use; justification records for utility program approvals.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: authorised utility list. Verify usage is restricted to authorised personnel. Confirm audit logging captures all utility program use. Sample recent usage logs.

controls.control_name: Installation of software on operational systems
controls.description: Procedures and measures shall be implemented to securely manage software installation on operational systems.
controls.required_evidence: Software installation policy; approved software list; MDM/endpoint management restricting unauthorised installs; software installation audit logs.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: software installation policy. Confirm endpoints restrict user-initiated installs via MDM. Verify approved software list exists. Review audit logs for unauthorised installs.

controls.description: Networks and network devices shall be secured, managed and controlled to protect information in systems and applications.
controls.required_evidence: Network security policy; firewall rules and review records; network diagram; WAF configuration; egress filtering evidence; network security assessment.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: network architecture diagram. Verify firewall rules are reviewed periodically. Confirm WAF is in place for internet-facing applications. Review egress filtering configuration.

controls.description: Security mechanisms, service levels and service requirements of network services shall be identified, implemented and monitored.
controls.required_evidence: Network service provider agreements with security SLAs; monitoring of network service performance; evidence of network service security assessments.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: network service provider contracts for security requirements. Verify SLA monitoring is in place. Confirm network services are assessed for security risks.

controls.description: Groups of information services, users and information systems shall be segregated in networks.
controls.required_evidence: Network segmentation architecture; VLAN configuration evidence; DMZ configuration; micro-segmentation or zero-trust network access evidence; firewall rules between segments.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: network segmentation documentation. Verify production is isolated from dev/test. Confirm DMZ is configured. Review firewall rules between network segments. Confirm zero-trust or least-privilege network access.

controls.description: Access to external websites shall be managed to reduce exposure to malicious content.
controls.required_evidence: Web filtering policy; web proxy or DNS filtering deployment evidence; blocked category logs; user awareness training on safe browsing.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Verify web filtering is deployed. Confirm malicious and inappropriate categories are blocked. Inspect filtering logs. Confirm coverage includes remote workers.

controls.description: Rules for the effective use of cryptography, including cryptographic key management, shall be defined and implemented.
controls.required_evidence: Cryptography policy (approved algorithms, key lengths, key management); TLS version configuration evidence; encryption at rest evidence; key management system records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: cryptography policy. Verify TLS 1.2+ is enforced for data in transit. Confirm AES-256 or equivalent for data at rest. Review key management procedures and key rotation records.

controls.description: Rules for the secure development of software and systems shall be established and applied.
controls.required_evidence: Secure SDLC policy; security requirements in development process; threat modelling records; SAST/DAST scan integration evidence; developer security training records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: secure SDLC policy. Verify security requirements are captured at design. Confirm SAST/DAST scanning is automated in CI/CD. Review developer security training records.

controls.description: Information security requirements shall be identified, specified and approved when developing or acquiring applications.
controls.required_evidence: Security requirements in product/feature specifications; security acceptance criteria; third-party application security assessments; software assurance records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Sample recent features/projects. Verify security requirements were documented at design. Confirm security acceptance criteria were met before release. Check third-party software assessments.

controls.control_name: Secure system architecture and engineering principles
controls.description: Principles for engineering secure systems shall be established, documented, maintained and applied to any information system implementation efforts.
controls.required_evidence: Secure architecture principles document (defence in depth, least privilege, fail secure, etc.); architecture review records; threat modelling output.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: secure architecture principles. Verify principles are applied in design reviews. Sample recent architectures and confirm security principles are evident. Review threat models.

controls.description: Secure coding principles shall be applied to software development.
controls.required_evidence: Secure coding standards (OWASP Top 10 alignment); SAST tool reports; code review records including security checks; developer secure coding training records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: secure coding standards. Verify SAST is integrated in CI/CD. Review last SAST report — confirm critical findings are remediated. Check developer training on secure coding.

controls.control_name: Security testing in development and acceptance
controls.description: Security testing processes shall be defined and implemented in the development life cycle.
controls.required_evidence: Security test plan; DAST/IAST scan results; penetration test reports; acceptance test security criteria; vulnerability remediation records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Verify security testing is conducted before releases. Inspect penetration test report (last 12 months). Confirm critical and high findings are remediated. Check DAST runs in CI/CD.

controls.description: The organisation shall supervise and monitor outsourced system development activities.
controls.required_evidence: Outsourced development contracts with security requirements; code review procedures for externally developed code; IP ownership clauses; security assessment records for development partners.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Inspect: outsourced development contracts. Verify security obligations are included. Confirm code reviews are conducted on outsourced code. Check IP ownership is clearly defined.

controls.control_name: Separation of development, test and production environments
controls.description: Development, testing and production environments shall be separated and secured.
controls.required_evidence: Environment separation architecture; access controls separating dev/test/prod; evidence production data is not used in dev/test without masking; deployment pipeline controls.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Verify dev, test, and prod are on separate infrastructure. Confirm access controls prevent developer direct access to prod. Inspect data masking for non-prod environments.

controls.description: Changes to information processing facilities and information systems shall be subject to change management procedures.
controls.required_evidence: Change management policy; change request and approval records; CAB or change review process; rollback procedures; emergency change records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Sample recent changes. Verify change requests were approved before implementation. Confirm impact assessment and rollback plan documented. Check emergency changes have post-hoc approval.

controls.description: Test information shall be appropriately selected, protected and managed.
controls.required_evidence: Test data policy; evidence synthetic or masked test data is used; controls restricting production data in test; data disposal records after testing.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Verify test data policy prohibits use of real production data. Confirm test environments use synthetic or masked data. Inspect data masking tool logs. Check test data disposal procedures.

controls.control_name: Protection of information systems during audit testing
controls.description: Audit tests and other assurance activities involving assessment of operational systems shall be planned and agreed to minimise disruptions to business processes.
controls.required_evidence: Audit testing rules of engagement; pre-agreed testing windows; evidence of management approval for audit access; post-audit access removal records.
controls.auditor_test_procedure: Verify penetration tests and audits have agreed rules of engagement. Confirm test access is granted only for the test period. Check audit access is revoked immediately after testing.
